mapper.insert: insert into sys_logininfor (user_name, status, ipaddr, msg, access_time) values (#{userName}, #{status}, #{ipaddr}, #{msg}, now())
mapper.select:
select info_id, user_name, ipaddr, status, msg, access_time from sys_logininfor
AND ipaddr like concat('%', #{ipaddr}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and cast(access_time as date) >= cast(#{params.beginTime} as date)
and cast(access_time as date) <= cast(#{params.endTime} as date)
order by info_id desc

select info_id, user_name, ipaddr, status, msg, access_time from sys_logininfor
AND ipaddr like concat('%', #{Logininfor.ipaddr}, '%')
AND status = #{Logininfor.status}
AND user_name like concat('%', #{Logininfor.userName}, '%')
and cast(access_time as date) >= cast(#{Logininfor.params.beginTime} as date)
and cast(access_time as date) <= cast(#{Logininfor.params.endTime} as date)
order by info_id desc
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_logininfor where info_id in
#{infoId}
